name: Chow Mein Candy Clusters/Clusters Royale
recipeInstructions:
1. Melt butterscotch bits in the top of a double boiler.
2. Remove from heat and immediately stir in chow mein noodles until all are coated.
3. Quickly stir in peanuts. Drop on wax paper using a tablespoon.
4. Let cool until firm. Makes about 2 dozen. Clusters Royale: Substitute 2 cups Rice Krispies cereal for chow mein noodles. A lighter and less bludgeoning snack.
